objectives: Understand core concepts of programming and web programming
Create and structure basic digital content for the web
learning_path.title: Foundations of Web Programming and Digital Content

objectives: Create semantic page structure using Html5
Organize content sections to support maintainability
learning_path.title: Building Page Structure with Html5

objectives: Apply Css3 to style Html5 content
Use layout and styling techniques to improve readability and visual hierarchy
learning_path.title: Styling Interfaces with Css3

objectives: Implement layouts that adapt to different screen sizes
Validate responsive behavior across common viewport ranges
learning_path.title: Responsive Web Design Essentials

objectives: Apply Accessibility (Wcag/Aria) principles to content and UI structure
Identify and fix common accessibility issues in web pages
learning_path.title: Accessibility (Wcag/Aria) in Practice

objectives: Use Browser Devtools to inspect Html5 and Css3 issues
Diagnose layout, responsiveness, and accessibility-related problems using Browser Devtools
learning_path.title: Debugging and Inspection with Browser Devtools

objectives: Build UI components using React
Compose a simple interface from multiple React components
learning_path.title: Introduction to React for UI Development

objectives: Use TypeScript to improve code clarity and correctness
Apply TypeScript types to common programming patterns
learning_path.title: TypeScript Fundamentals for Web Programming

objectives: Add TypeScript to an existing React codebase
Refactor React components to use TypeScript safely
learning_path.title: Add TypeScript to a React Project

objectives: Identify performance bottlenecks using Browser Devtools
Apply Web Performance Optimization techniques to improve loading and runtime behavior
learning_path.title: Web Performance Optimization with Browser Devtools

objectives: Use tools for software configuration management to track and manage changes
Apply consistent configuration practices across a web programming workflow
learning_path.title: Configuration Management Tools for Web Projects

objectives: Use e-services to publish or deliver digital content
Integrate a simple web programming workflow with use e-services for delivery
learning_path.title: Delivering Digital Services with E-Services

matched_occupation.description: Web developers develop, implement and document web-accessible software based on the designs provided. They align the client's web presence with its business strategy, troubleshoot software problems and issues and look for ways to improve the application.
matched_occupation.label: web developer
